---
title: "test_muninn_crucible.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\crucible\test_muninn_crucible.py"
loc: 61
complexity: 3
logic_score: 4.27
style_score: 3.82
intel_score: 6.65
overall_score: 4.02
---

## Intent
The `test_muninn_crucible.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on TestMuninnCrucible, setUp, test_hunter_breach_detection, test_crucible_forge_and_steel, test_heart_execution_cycle. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TestMuninnCrucible, setUp, test_hunter_breach_detection, test_crucible_forge_and_steel, test_heart_execution_cycle. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.6/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 16 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [unittest](file://unittest)
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [src.sentinel.muninn_heart](file://src.sentinel.muninn_heart)
- [src.sentinel.muninn_hunter](file://src.sentinel.muninn_hunter)
- [src.sentinel.muninn_crucible](file://src.sentinel.muninn_crucible)
- [src.cstar.core.uplink](file://src.cstar.core.uplink)

### Exports
- `TestMuninnCrucible`
- `setUp`
- `test_hunter_breach_detection`
- `test_crucible_forge_and_steel`
- `test_heart_execution_cycle`
